source_pr.title: plan: collect visit info during logical plan build
source_pr.body:
Privilege check need DB Table and Column names, and also statement type to decide the privilege type.
In theory, it's possible to get all the information during preprocess, after resolve name. 
But I find many field in the `ast.Node` is still nil.
This is the skeleton code, I'll back to it and add more details step by step.

fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: files: mysql/const.go, plan/expression_rewriter.go, plan/logical_plan_builder.go, plan/logical_plan_test.go, plan/optimizer.go, plan/physical_plan_test.go, plan/planbuilder.go, plan/preprocess.go, plan/preprocess_test.go
